title: Summarizing Time Series Data with Seasonal Decomposition
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a summary of a time series dataset with seasonal decomposition, where the dataset is represented as a pandas dataframe. The summary should include the trend, seasonal, and residual components.
constraints: Must include a table with the trend, seasonal, and residual components

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated summary adhere to the constraints of being under 200 words and including a table with the trend, seasonal, and residual components?
Does the generated summary correctly decompose the time series dataset into trend, seasonal, and residual components?
Is the generated summary readable and well-formatted?
